learningObjectives: Name family members and friends using twelve Starters vocabulary words.
Use am, is and are to describe people at Pre-A1 level.
Use possessive adjectives my, your, his and her before family nouns.
Answer who-questions about people in pictures and short texts.
Read Mai's family text and listen for names and relationships.
Write and speak short answers about yourself, family and friends.
grammarFocus: Possessive adjectives: my, your, his, her

grammarReference.explanation: Dùng am với I; is với he, she, it và danh từ số ít; are với you, we, they và danh từ số nhiều.
commonMistakes: I is happy (×) → I am happy (✓)
She are my sister (×) → She is my sister (✓)

grammarReference.structure: Possessive adjectives: my, your, his, her
grammarReference.explanation: Tính từ sở hữu đứng trước danh từ để chỉ ai sở hữu: my father, her eyes.
Dùng who để hỏi về người. What hỏi về vật; where hỏi về nơi chốn.
commonMistakes: What is he? (khi hỏi danh tính) → Who is he? (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Meet My Family
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and use father, mother, brother and sister in short sentences.

exercises.title: Learn: Family Words
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best word.

questions.questionText: Your mother's husband is your _____.
questions.explanation: Father (bố) là cha — chồng của mẹ. Friend cũng bắt đầu bằng f nhưng không phải thành viên gia đình.

choices.distractorNote: Cùng chữ f; hay nhầm với bạn
Nam trong gia đình nhưng không phải cha

questions.questionText: Match: 'This is my _____. She cooks dinner.'
questions.explanation: Mother (mẹ) — đại từ she giúp nhận ra đáp án.

questions.questionText: A boy in your family is your _____.
questions.explanation: Brother (anh/em trai) — con trai trong gia đình.

questions.questionText: A girl in your family is your _____.
questions.explanation: Sister (chị/em gái) — con gái trong gia đình.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Family Words
exercises.instructions: Match each word to the correct meaning.

questions.questionText: Match the family words to their meanings.
questions.explanation: Mỗi từ khớp một nghĩa rõ ràng. Brother và sister hay bị đảo.

exercises.title: Check: Family Words Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: She is kind. She is my _____.
questions.explanation: She + kind → mother (mẹ). Father dùng he.

questions.questionText: I have one _____. His name is Nam.
questions.explanation: His name → brother (anh/em trai). Sister dùng her.

questions.questionText: My _____ is tall. He has black hair.
questions.explanation: He + tall → father (bố). Mother dùng she.

exercises.title: Apply: Family in Sentences
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct family word.

questions.questionText: Complete: This is my [0]. | She is my [1]. | He is my [2].
questions.explanation: father (he); mother (she); brother (he).

content.template: This is my [0]. She is my [1]. He is my [2].

exercises.title: Review: Family Words Mix
exercises.instructions: Mixed review. Choose carefully.

questions.questionText: Your father's wife is your _____.
questions.explanation: Mother (mẹ) — vợ của bố.

questions.questionText: Linh is a girl in my family. She is my _____.
questions.explanation: Girl in family → sister (chị/em gái).

questions.questionText: Which word is NOT a family member?
questions.explanation: Father, mother, brother, sister là gia đình. Friend (bạn) không phải.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Friends and People
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and use friend, boy and girl to talk about people at Starters level.

exercises.title: Learn: Friends and People
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best word.

questions.questionText: Tom plays with you at school. Tom is your _____.
questions.explanation: Friend (bạn) là người chơi cùng ở trường. Brother là anh/em trai trong gia đình.

choices.distractorNote: Thành viên gia đình, không phải bạn ở trường

questions.questionText: A young male child is a _____.
questions.explanation: Boy (cậu bé) chỉ con trai nhỏ. Girl là con gái; friend là quan hệ.

choices.distractorNote: Từ chỉ quan hệ, không phải giới tính

questions.questionText: Anna is a young _____. She is seven.
questions.explanation: Girl (cô bé) phù hợp với tên nữ và tuổi nhỏ. Boy dùng cho con trai.

questions.questionText: My best _____ is Linh. We sit together in class.
questions.explanation: Friend (bạn) là người ngồi cạnh ở lớp. Sister là chị/em gái trong gia đình.

choices.distractorNote: Vai trò gia đình; bạn cùng lớp không nhất thiết là chị/em

exercises.title: Practice: Match Friends and People
exercises.instructions: Match each word to the correct meaning.

questions.questionText: Match the people words to their meanings.
questions.explanation: Mỗi từ khớp một nghĩa rõ ràng. Boy/girl nói giới tính/tuổi; friend nói quan hệ.

pairs.right: a person you like and know

exercises.title: Check: Friends Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: She is not my sister. She is my _____ from class.
questions.explanation: from class → friend (bạn), không phải thành viên gia đình.

questions.questionText: Look at the picture: a young male child. He is a _____.
questions.explanation: Boy (cậu bé) = young male. Girl là nữ.

choices.distractorNote: Nói quan hệ, không phải giới tính

questions.questionText: Lily and Mai play together. They are _____.
questions.explanation: Hai người chơi cùng nhau thường là friends (bạn). Sister cần quan hệ gia đình.

choices.distractorNote: Vai trò gia đình không được nêu
Anh em trai; cả hai là con gái

exercises.title: Apply: People in Sentences
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct word.

questions.questionText: Complete: Tom is my [0]. | He is a [1]. | Anna is a [2].
questions.explanation: friend (bạn); boy (cậu bé) với he; girl (cô bé) với Anna.

content.template: Tom is my [0]. He is a [1]. Anna is a [2].

exercises.title: Review: Friends and People Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: A person you know from school but not family is a _____.
questions.explanation: Friend (bạn) — người quen ở trường, không phải gia đình.

questions.questionText: Nam is six. He is a _____.
questions.explanation: He + young child → boy (cậu bé).

questions.questionText: Anna is in our class. She is a _____.
questions.explanation: She + young → girl (cô bé).

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Face Words
lessons.learningObjective: Name and use head, eyes, nose, mouth and hair in short sentences.

exercises.title: Learn: Face Words
exercises.instructions: Read each clue. Choose the face word.

questions.questionText: You see with your _____.
questions.explanation: Eyes (mắt) dùng để nhìn. Nose để ngửi; mouth để ăn.

questions.questionText: You smell with your _____.
questions.explanation: Nose (mũi) dùng để ngửi.

choices.distractorNote: Trên đầu, không dùng để ngửi

questions.questionText: You eat with your _____.
questions.explanation: Mouth (miệng) dùng để ăn và nói.

choices.distractorNote: Cả phần đầu, không dùng để ăn

questions.questionText: Long or short _____ grows on your head.
questions.explanation: Hair (tóc) mọc trên đầu. Head là cả phần đầu.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Face Parts
exercises.instructions: Match each word to what you do with it or where it is.

questions.questionText: Match face words to their descriptions.
questions.explanation: Mỗi bộ phận có chức năng hoặc vị trí riêng trên khuôn mặt/đầu.

pairs.right: you eat and talk with it

exercises.title: Check: Face Words Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer. No hints.

questions.questionText: The part above your neck that has your face is your _____.
questions.explanation: Head (đầu) là phần trên cổ có mặt. Hair chỉ là tóc.

questions.questionText: Her _____ are brown. She can see well.
questions.explanation: Eyes (mắt) — are + eyes; dùng để nhìn.

questions.questionText: Touch your _____. It is at the top of your body.
questions.explanation: Head (đầu) ở trên cùng cơ thể.

choices.distractorNote: Trong mặt, không phải trên cùng

exercises.title: Apply: Face Words in Context
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences with face words.

questions.questionText: Complete: I see with my [0]. | I smell with my [1]. | Her [2] is long.
questions.explanation: eyes (mắt); nose (mũi); hair (tóc) — her hair is long.

content.template: I see with my [0]. I smell with my [1]. Her [2] is long.

exercises.title: Review: Face Words Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best face word.

questions.questionText: Open your _____ to eat.
questions.explanation: Mouth (miệng) dùng để ăn.

questions.questionText: His _____ is black. It is on his head.
questions.explanation: Hair (tóc) trên đầu. Eyes ở trên mặt.

questions.questionText: Which part do you use to smell flowers?
questions.explanation: Nose (mũi) dùng để ngửi hoa.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Who Is Who?
lessons.learningObjective: Use who to ask about people and choose am, is or are with I, he, she and they.

exercises.title: Learn: Who and Be Verbs
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct word to complete each sentence.

questions.questionText: I _____ Mai. I am eight years old.
questions.explanation: Dùng am với I (tôi). Is dùng với he/she/it; are với you/we/they.

questions.questionText: She _____ my sister. Her name is Linh.
questions.explanation: Dùng is với she (cô ấy/chị ấy).

choices.distractorNote: Dùng với số nhiều hoặc you

questions.questionText: They _____ my friends from school.
questions.explanation: Dùng are với they (họ).

questions.questionText: _____ is your friend? The boy in the blue shirt.
questions.explanation: Who (ai) hỏi về người. What hỏi về vật; where hỏi về nơi.

exercises.title: Practice: Who Questions
exercises.instructions: Complete the questions and answers.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] is he? | He [1] my brother. | [2] are they?
questions.explanation: Who is he?; He is my brother; Who are they?

content.template: [0] is he? He [1] my brother. [2] are they?

exercises.title: Check: Who Is Who Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer. No hints.

questions.questionText: _____ is the girl? She is my sister.
questions.explanation: Who (ai) — hỏi về người (the girl).

questions.questionText: He _____ my father.
questions.explanation: He is — is đi với he.

questions.questionText: Best question: _____ is your mother?
questions.explanation: Who is your mother? — hỏi danh tính người.

exercises.title: Apply: Order Who Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order.

questions.questionText: Make: Who / is / she?
questions.explanation: Who is she? — Who + is + đại từ.

questions.questionText: Make: He / is / my / friend.
questions.explanation: He is my friend. — trả lời câu hỏi who.

exercises.title: Review: Who and Be Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct answer.

questions.questionText: I _____ eight. My name is Mai.
questions.explanation: I am eight — am với I.

questions.questionText: _____ is the boy? He is my brother.
questions.explanation: Who is the boy? — hỏi về người.

questions.questionText: Anna and Tom _____ my friends.
questions.explanation: Hai người = they → They are / Anna and Tom are.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: am, is, are
lessons.learningObjective: Choose am, is and are correctly with I, he, she, we and they.

exercises.title: Learn: am, is, are
exercises.instructions: Choose am, is or are to complete each sentence.

questions.questionText: I _____ seven years old.
questions.explanation: Dùng am với I (tôi). Is dùng với he/she/it; are với you/we/they.

questions.questionText: He _____ my brother.
questions.explanation: Dùng is với he (anh ấy/cậu ấy).

choices.distractorNote: Dùng với số nhiều hoặc you

questions.questionText: We _____ happy friends.
questions.explanation: Dùng are với we (chúng tôi/chúng ta).

questions.questionText: They _____ my mother and father.
questions.explanation: Dùng are với they (họ) — hai người = they.

exercises.title: Practice: Fill in am, is, are
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences with am, is or are.

questions.questionText: Complete: I [0] Mai. | She [1] my friend. | They [2] boys.
questions.explanation: I am; She is; They are — chia động từ be theo chủ ngữ.

content.template: I [0] Mai. She [1] my friend. They [2] boys.

exercises.title: Check: Be Verb Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form. No hints.

questions.questionText: You _____ my good friend.
questions.explanation: You are — are đi với you.

questions.questionText: Anna and I _____ in Class 2A.
questions.explanation: Anna and I = we → We are.

questions.questionText: It _____ a family photo.
questions.explanation: It is — is đi với it (nó).

exercises.title: Apply: Build Sentences with be
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: I / am / eight.
questions.explanation: I am eight. — I + am + số tuổi.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: They / are / my / friends.
questions.explanation: They are my friends. — They + are + my + danh từ.

exercises.title: Review: am, is, are Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form.

questions.questionText: My mother _____ kind.
questions.explanation: My mother is kind — mother = she → is.

questions.questionText: We _____ happy!
questions.explanation: We are happy — are với we.

questions.questionText: _____ am Mai. (Choose the correct start)
questions.explanation: I am Mai — chỉ I đi với am.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: my, your, his, her
lessons.learningObjective: Use possessive adjectives my, your, his and her before family and friend nouns.

exercises.title: Learn: my, your, his, her
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct possessive adjective.

questions.questionText: I talk about myself: This is _____ mother.
questions.explanation: My (của tôi) dùng khi nói về bản thân.

questions.questionText: You ask a friend: Is this _____ brother?
questions.explanation: Your (của bạn) khi hỏi người nghe.

questions.questionText: Nam is a boy. _____ name is Nam.
questions.explanation: His (của anh ấy) với Nam (boy).

questions.questionText: Anna is a girl. _____ eyes are brown.
questions.explanation: Her (của cô ấy) với Anna (girl).

exercises.title: Practice: Possessives Gap Fill
exercises.instructions: Complete with my, your, his or her.

questions.questionText: Complete: This is [0] father. | [1] name is Duc. | [2] hair is black.
questions.explanation: my father; His name (Duc = boy); Her hair (mother = she).

content.template: This is [0] father. [1] name is Duc. [2] hair is black.

exercises.title: Check: Possessives Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Lily is my friend. _____ name is Lily.
questions.explanation: Lily là nữ → Her name.

questions.questionText: Point to yourself: _____ mother is kind.
questions.explanation: Nói về bản thân → My mother.

questions.questionText: Ask your friend: Is _____ sister seven?
questions.explanation: Hỏi bạn → your sister.

exercises.title: Apply: Order Possessive Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: She / is / my / sister.
questions.explanation: She is my sister. — She + is + my + noun.

questions.questionText: Make: His / name / is / Nam.
questions.explanation: His name is Nam. — His + name + is + tên.

exercises.title: Review: Possessives Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct possessive.

questions.questionText: Mai's father: _____ hair is black.
questions.explanation: Father = he → His hair.

questions.questionText: Talk about your friend (boy): _____ is my friend.
questions.explanation: He is my friend — giới thiệu bạn nam.

choices.distractorNote: Her là tính từ sở hữu

questions.questionText: Complete: _____ eyes are brown. (about mother)
questions.explanation: Mother = she → Her eyes.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: My Family Photo
lessons.learningObjective: Read a short text about Mai's family and answer questions about main idea and details.

exercises.title: Learn: Read Mai's Family
exercises.instructions: Read the text. Then answer the questions.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: What is the main idea of the text?
questions.explanation: Toàn bài Mai giới thiệu gia đình và bạn. Không nói về trường hay đồ ăn.

choices.text: Mai introduces her family and friend.
Mai talks about her favourite food.
choices.distractorNote: Không có đồ ăn trong bài

questions.questionText: How old is Mai's brother?
questions.explanation: Bài viết: He is six.

exercises.title: Practice: More from the Text
exercises.instructions: Read again. Answer about people in the text.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: Why is Anna in the text?
questions.explanation: Anna được mô tả là bạn trong lớp, không phải thành viên gia đình.

choices.distractorNote: Là con gái nhưng không phải chị/em

choices.text: She is Mai's friend from class.

choices.distractorNote: Vai trò người lớn không có

questions.questionText: In 'Her eyes are brown', what does her refer to?
questions.explanation: Her = mother trong câu trước.

exercises.title: Check: Family Reading Quiz
exercises.instructions: Read carefully. Choose the best answer.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: Put the ideas in order: (1) Mai tells her age (2) Mai describes parents (3) Mai mentions brother and friend
questions.explanation: Bài đi từ bản thân → bố mẹ → anh trai và bạn.

choices.distractorNote: Tuổi đến trước chi tiết bố mẹ

questions.questionText: How many brothers does Mai have?
questions.explanation: I have one brother.

exercises.title: Apply: Match People to Facts
exercises.instructions: Use the text. Match each person to a fact.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: Match people to facts from the text.
questions.explanation: Anna = girl in class; Nam = six; father = black hair; mother = brown eyes.

pairs.right: She is a girl in our class

exercises.title: Review: Mai's Family Mix
exercises.instructions: Read the text again. Mixed review.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: How old is Mai?
questions.explanation: I am eight years old.

questions.questionText: At the end, how does Mai feel?
questions.explanation: We are happy!

questions.questionText: Who is Nam?
questions.explanation: His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six — anh trai Mai.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Read About Friends
lessons.learningObjective: Read about friends in Mai's family text and answer detail questions.

exercises.title: Learn: Read About Friends
exercises.instructions: Read Mai's text. Answer about Anna and friends.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: What is Anna's role in the text?
questions.explanation: Anna là bạn của Mai: We have a friend. Her name is Anna.

choices.distractorNote: Là con gái nhưng không phải chị/em

questions.questionText: Anna is a _____ in Mai's class.
questions.explanation: She is a girl in our class.

exercises.title: Practice: Friends in Context
exercises.instructions: Read again. Answer about people and words.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: In 'He is a boy', who is he?
questions.explanation: He là Nam — anh trai của Mai.

questions.questionText: Why is Anna not in Mai's family photo as a sister?
questions.explanation: Bài nói friend from class, không phải sister.

choices.text: She is a friend, not a sister.
She is not in the photo.

exercises.title: Check: Friends Reading Quiz
exercises.instructions: Read carefully. Choose the best answer.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: Who is the boy in the text?
questions.explanation: Nam là boy, anh trai sáu tuổi của Mai.

questions.questionText: Order: (1) parents (2) brother (3) friend — how does Mai tell the story?
questions.explanation: Mai mô tả bố mẹ trước, rồi anh trai, rồi bạn Anna.

exercises.title: Apply: Match Friends to Facts
exercises.instructions: Use the text. Match each person to a fact.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: Match people to facts from the text.
questions.explanation: Anna = girl in class; Nam = six; father = black hair; mother = brown eyes.

pairs.right: She is a girl in our class

exercises.title: Review: Friends Reading Mix
exercises.instructions: Read and answer — mixed review.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: Anna's name is _____.
questions.explanation: Her name is Anna.

questions.questionText: Mai and Anna are both _____.
questions.explanation: Anna is a girl in our class — cùng lớp với Mai.

questions.questionText: We have a friend. Her name is _____.
questions.explanation: Câu trong bài: Her name is Anna.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: More Details from the Text
lessons.learningObjective: Find specific details about hair, eyes, age and feelings in Mai's text.

exercises.title: Learn: More Details
exercises.instructions: Read the text. Answer detail questions.

questions.questionText: What colour is Mai's mother's eyes?
questions.explanation: Her eyes are brown — her = mother.

questions.questionText: How old is Nam?
questions.explanation: He is six.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Introducing Friends
lessons.learningObjective: Listen to a home conversation and identify names and relationships.

exercises.title: Learn: Listen at Home
exercises.instructions: Listen to the conversation. Choose the correct answer.

script.title: At Home

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: He is my brother. His name is Duc.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: No. She is my friend. Her name is Lily.

script.audioNotes: Clear, slow delivery with short pauses. Total duration approx. 35 seconds.

questions.questionText: Who is the woman in the photo?
questions.explanation: Minh nói: This is my mother.

questions.questionText: What is the boy's name?
questions.explanation: Minh nói: His name is Duc.

exercises.title: Practice: More from At Home
exercises.instructions: Listen again. Answer the next questions.

script.title: At Home

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: He is my brother. His name is Duc.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: No. She is my friend. Her name is Lily.

script.audioNotes: Clear, slow delivery with short pauses. Total duration approx. 35 seconds.

questions.questionText: Who is Lily?
questions.explanation: She is my friend.

questions.questionText: Minh says 'He is my brother.' Who is he?
questions.explanation: He = the boy — anh trai Duc của Minh.

exercises.title: Check: At Home Listening
exercises.instructions: Listen carefully. Choose the best answer.

script.title: At Home

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: He is my brother. His name is Duc.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: No. She is my friend. Her name is Lily.

script.audioNotes: Clear, slow delivery with short pauses. Total duration approx. 35 seconds.

questions.questionText: Is the girl Minh's sister?
questions.explanation: Is the girl your sister? — No. She is my friend.

choices.distractorNote: Câu trả lời rõ trong hội thoại

questions.questionText: How many people does Minh talk about (not counting himself)?
questions.explanation: Mother, brother Duc, friend Lily — ba người.

exercises.title: Apply: Match At Home People
exercises.instructions: Listen again. Match each name to their role.

lines.speaker: Minh

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: No. She is my friend. Her name is Lily.

script.audioNotes: Clear, slow delivery with short pauses. Total duration approx. 35 seconds.

questions.questionText: Match names to relationships.
questions.explanation: Duc = brother; Lily = friend; woman = mother.

exercises.title: Review: At Home Mix
exercises.instructions: Listen and answer — mixed review.

script.title: At Home

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: He is my brother. His name is Duc.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: No. She is my friend. Her name is Lily.

script.audioNotes: Clear, slow delivery with short pauses. Total duration approx. 35 seconds.

questions.questionText: Who is Duc?
questions.explanation: He is my brother. His name is Duc.

questions.questionText: The examiner asks: Who is this? Minh says:
questions.explanation: Câu đầu: This is my mother.

questions.questionText: Lily is a _____.
questions.explanation: She is my friend. Her name is Lily.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: At School Dialogue
lessons.learningObjective: Listen to a school conversation and identify family members.

exercises.title: Learn: Listen at School
exercises.instructions: Listen to the conversation at school. Answer the first questions.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Hello, Hoa. Who is the girl with you?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: She is my sister. Her name is Lan.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Yes. He is my brother. He is a boy.

questions.questionText: Who is Lan?
questions.explanation: Hoa nói: She is my sister. Her name is Lan.

choices.distractorNote: Thành viên gia đình được nêu

questions.questionText: Who is the man?
questions.explanation: He is my father.

exercises.title: Practice: More from At School
exercises.instructions: Listen again. Answer the next questions.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Hello, Hoa. Who is the girl with you?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: She is my sister. Her name is Lan.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Yes. He is my brother. He is a boy.

questions.questionText: Is the boy Hoa's brother?
questions.explanation: Yes. He is my brother.

questions.questionText: Hoa says the brother is a _____.
questions.explanation: He is a boy.

exercises.instructions: Listen one more time. Choose carefully.

lines.text: Hello, Hoa. Who is the girl with you?

lines.text: She is my sister. Her name is Lan.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Yes. He is my brother. He is a boy.

questions.questionText: What is the sister's name?
questions.explanation: Her name is Lan.

questions.questionText: How many family members does Hoa talk about?
questions.explanation: Sister, father, brother — ba người.

exercises.title: Apply: Match School Dialogue

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Hello, Hoa. Who is the girl with you?

lines.speaker: Hoa

lines.speaker: Hoa

questions.explanation: Lan = sister; man = father; boy = brother.

exercises.instructions: Listen and answer — mixed review.

questions.explanation: He is a boy.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: He is my brother. His name is Duc.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: No. She is my friend. Her name is Lily.

script.audioNotes: Clear, slow delivery with short pauses. Total duration approx. 35 seconds.

questions.questionText: The girl's name is _____.
questions.explanation: Her name is Lily.

questions.questionText: Minh introduces his mother first. True or false?
questions.explanation: Câu đầu tiên về người: This is my mother — đúng.

choices.distractorNote: Thứ tự trong script là mẹ trước

questions.questionText: Brother and friend: which comes first in the dialogue?
questions.explanation: Brother (Duc) trước, friend (Lily) sau.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Write About My Family
lessons.learningObjective: Write short phrases to introduce yourself and one family member using Starters vocabulary.

exercises.title: Learn: Family Writing Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences about family.

questions.questionText: Complete: My name [0] Mai. | This is [1] mother. | He is [2] brother.
questions.explanation: is (My name is); my (của tôi); my brother.

content.template: My name [0] Mai. This is [1] mother. He is [2] brother.

exercises.title: Practice: Order Family Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: My / name / is / Mai.
questions.explanation: My name is Mai. — giới thiệu tên.

questions.questionText: Make: She / is / my / mother.
questions.explanation: She is my mother.

exercises.title: Check: Write About My Family
exercises.instructions: Write short answers. Use 1–5 words for each answer.

content.taskDescription: Look at the picture of a family. Write short answers to the three questions.
prompts: 2. Who is the woman? (Write: my mother / my sister / my friend)
3. Write one sentence: My _____ is _____. (Use father, mother, brother, sister or friend)
successCriteria: Uses at least two unit vocabulary words
Uses am, is or are correctly in the sentence
Spelling of core words is recognisable

modelAnswer.text: My name is Mai. my mother My brother is Nam.

grammar.criteria: Dùng am/is/are và my/his/her đúng trong câu ngắn.

vocabulary.criteria: Dùng từ gia đình và bạn bè trong unit.

organization.criteria: Trả lời đúng thứ tự câu hỏi; câu rõ ràng.

taskAchievement.criteria: Hoàn thành đủ phần; độ dài phù hợp Starters (tối thiểu 5 từ).

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi.

exercises.title: Apply: Choose the Best Sentence
exercises.instructions: Choose the best written sentence.

questions.questionText: Best sentence to introduce your brother:
questions.explanation: He is my brother. — đúng ngữ pháp Starters.

questions.questionText: Best answer: What is your name?
questions.explanation: My name is Mai. — câu đầy đủ.

exercises.title: Review: Family Writing Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete the writing frames.

questions.questionText: Complete: I [0] eight. | [1] is my father. | We [2] happy.
questions.explanation: am (I am); He (father); are (We are).

content.template: I [0] eight. [1] is my father. We [2] happy.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Short Sentences About Family
lessons.learningObjective: Write short sentences and answers about family members.

exercises.title: Learn: Family Sentence Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence about family.

questions.questionText: Complete: This is [0] father. | She is [1] mother. | He is [2] brother.
questions.explanation: my (của tôi) trước các thành viên gia đình.

content.template: This is [0] father. She is [1] mother. He is [2] brother.

exercises.title: Practice: Order Family Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put words in order to make sentences.

questions.questionText: Make: My / father / is / tall.
questions.explanation: My father is tall. — mẫu câu mô tả gia đình.

questions.questionText: Make: She / is / my / sister.
questions.explanation: She is my sister.

exercises.title: Check: Write About Family
exercises.instructions: Write short answers. Use 1–5 words each.

content.taskDescription: Write short answers about your family. Use words from the unit.
prompts: 2. Who is your mother? (Write: my mother)
3. Write one sentence: My _____ is _____. (Use father, brother or sister)
successCriteria: Uses my before a family noun

modelAnswer.text: My name is Mai. my mother My brother is Nam.

grammar.criteria: Dùng am/is/are và my/his/her đúng trong câu ngắn.

vocabulary.criteria: Dùng từ gia đình và bạn bè trong unit.

organization.criteria: Trả lời đúng thứ tự câu hỏi; câu rõ ràng.

taskAchievement.criteria: Hoàn thành đủ phần; độ dài phù hợp Starters (tối thiểu 5 từ).

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi.

exercises.title: Apply: More Family Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete the writing frames.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] name is Hoa. | [1] is my sister. | We [2] happy.
questions.explanation: My name; She; are — We are happy.

content.template: [0] name is Hoa. [1] is my sister. We [2] happy.

exercises.title: Review: Family Sentences Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best sentence.

questions.questionText: Best sentence about your mother:
questions.explanation: My mother is kind. — my + mother + is.

questions.questionText: Complete in writing: They _____ my friends.
questions.explanation: They are my friends.

questions.questionText: Which sentence uses my correctly?
questions.explanation: my đứng trước danh từ: my sister.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Write About a Friend
lessons.learningObjective: Write short gap-fill frames and answers about a friend.

exercises.title: Learn: Friend Writing Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete sentences about a friend.

questions.questionText: Complete: Tom is [0] friend. | [1] is a boy. | [2] name is Tom.
questions.explanation: my friend; He; His name.

content.template: Tom is [0] friend. [1] is a boy. [2] name is Tom.

exercises.title: Practice: Order Friend Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: She / is / my / friend.
questions.explanation: She is my friend.

questions.questionText: Make: Her / name / is / Anna.
questions.explanation: Her name is Anna.

exercises.title: Check: Write About a Friend
exercises.instructions: Write short answers about a friend.

content.taskDescription: Write about your friend using short answers.
prompts: 2. Is your friend a boy or a girl?
successCriteria: Uses friend and boy or girl

modelAnswer.text: Her name is Anna. a girl She is my friend.

grammar.criteria: Dùng am/is/are và my/his/her đúng trong câu ngắn.

vocabulary.criteria: Dùng từ gia đình và bạn bè trong unit.

organization.criteria: Trả lời đúng thứ tự câu hỏi; câu rõ ràng.

taskAchievement.criteria: Hoàn thành đủ phần; độ dài phù hợp Starters (tối thiểu 5 từ).

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi.

exercises.title: Apply: Write About a Friend
exercises.instructions: Complete the gap-fill writing frames.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] name is Lily. | She is [1] friend. | We [2] happy.
questions.explanation: Her name; my; are — We are happy.

content.template: [0] name is Lily. She is [1] friend. We [2] happy.

exercises.title: Review: Friend Writing Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose or complete friend writing frames.

questions.questionText: Anna is a girl. Best sentence:
questions.explanation: Her name is Anna. — her với tên nữ.

questions.questionText: Best sentence: Tom is my _____.
questions.explanation: Tom is my friend.

choices.distractorNote: Có thể nhưng câu hỏi về bạn

questions.questionText: Which is correct?
questions.explanation: He is a boy. — he + is + a boy.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Talk About Your Family
lessons.learningObjective: Answer simple questions about yourself, family and friends with short phrases.

exercises.title: Learn: What to Say About Family
exercises.instructions: Choose the best thing to say.

content.pictureDescription: A mother, father, boy, girl and friend in a garden.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: What is your name? You say:
questions.explanation: My name is Mai. — giới thiệu tên đầy đủ.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: How old are you? You say:
questions.explanation: I am eight. — I + am + tuổi.

exercises.title: Practice: Family Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply.

content.pictureDescription: A mother, father, boy, girl and friend in a garden.

questions.questionText: Who is she? (your mother) You say:
questions.explanation: She is my mother.

questions.questionText: Who is he? (your father) You say:
questions.explanation: He is my father.

exercises.title: Check: Family Interview
exercises.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions. Say at least one word for each question.

content.prompt: The examiner will ask you about you and your family. Look at your family photo if you have one.
content.pictureDescription: A simple picture showing a mother, father, two children and a friend in a garden.
followUpQuestions: Who is he/she in the picture?
Is he/she your brother, sister or friend?
What colour is your mother's or your friend's hair?

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Từ gia đình (mother, father, brother, sister, friend) nghe được rõ.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Trả lời bằng từ hoặc cụm ngắn; không im lặng quá lâu.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Dùng am/is/are hoặc my/his/her trong ít nhất hai câu trả lời.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Dùng ít nhất ba từ vựng unit đúng nghĩa.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Quick Family Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase for each situation.

questions.questionText: Friend asks: Is she your sister? (No — she is your friend) You say:
questions.explanation: No. She is my friend.

questions.questionText: You want to say your hair is black. You say:
questions.explanation: My hair is black. — my hair + is.

exercises.title: Review: Family Speaking Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best spoken reply.

questions.questionText: Introduce your brother Nam. You say:
questions.explanation: He is my brother. His name is Nam.

choices.text: He is my brother. His name is Nam.

questions.questionText: Say you are happy with your family. You say:
questions.explanation: We are happy! — như cuối bài đọc Mai.

questions.questionText: Teacher asks: Who is your friend? You say:
questions.explanation: Anna is my friend. hoặc She is my friend.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Picture — Who Is Who?
lessons.learningObjective: Identify and name family and friends in a picture using short phrases.

exercises.title: Learn: Who Is in the Picture?
exercises.instructions: Imagine a family picture. Choose the best answer.

content.pictureDescription: A mother, father, boy, girl and friend in a garden.

questions.questionText: The tall man is the _____.
questions.explanation: Trong ảnh gia đình, người đàn ông lớn thường là father.

choices.distractorNote: Con trai trẻ, không phải người đàn ông lớn
Thường không phải người đàn ông lớn

questions.questionText: The young girl in the family is the _____.
questions.explanation: Young girl in family → sister.

exercises.title: Practice: Point and Name
exercises.instructions: Choose what you would say for each person.

content.pictureDescription: A mother, father, boy, girl and friend in a garden.

questions.questionText: Point to your mother. You say:
questions.explanation: She is my mother.

questions.questionText: Point to a boy who is your brother. You say:
questions.explanation: He is my brother.

choices.distractorNote: Sai quan hệ nếu là brother

exercises.title: Check: Picture Interview
exercises.instructions: Answer about people in a family picture.

content.prompt: Look at a family picture. The examiner asks about the people.
content.pictureDescription: A simple picture showing a mother, father, two children and a friend in a garden.
followUpQuestions: Is the girl your sister or your friend?
What do you say about your father?

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Từ gia đình (mother, father, brother, sister, friend) nghe được rõ.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Trả lời bằng từ hoặc cụm ngắn; không im lặng quá lâu.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Dùng am/is/are hoặc my/his/her trong ít nhất hai câu trả lời.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Dùng ít nhất ba từ vựng unit đúng nghĩa.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Picture Who Is Who
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase for each situation.

questions.questionText: Teacher points to a girl from class. You say:
questions.explanation: She is my friend — from class, not sister.

choices.distractorNote: Bạn cùng lớp thường là friend

questions.questionText: You point to yourself and your age. You say:
questions.explanation: I am eight. — giới thiệu tuổi bản thân.

exercises.title: Review: Picture Speaking Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase.

questions.questionText: Point to your father. You say:
questions.explanation: He is my father.

questions.questionText: The woman in the photo is not your friend. She is your _____.
questions.explanation: Woman in family photo → mother or sister; mother phổ biến hơn.

questions.questionText: Ask about a person: _____ is he?
questions.explanation: Who is he? — hỏi về người.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: More Situational Replies
lessons.learningObjective: Choose and say appropriate short replies in family and friend situations.

exercises.title: Learn: Situational Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply in each situation.

questions.questionText: Friend asks: Who is she? (your sister) You say:
questions.explanation: She is my sister.

questions.questionText: Teacher asks: How old are you? You say:
questions.explanation: I am + tuổi.

exercises.title: Practice: More Situations
exercises.instructions: Choose what you would say.

questions.questionText: Examiner: Is he your father? (Yes) You say:
questions.explanation: Yes. He is my father.

questions.questionText: Friend asks about Anna. You say:
questions.explanation: Her name is Anna. — giới thiệu bạn gái.

questions.questionText: You finish talking about family happily. You say:
questions.explanation: We are happy! — kết thúc tích cực.

exercises.title: Check: Situational Speaking
exercises.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions in short phrases.

content.prompt: The examiner asks everyday questions about you, your family and friends.
content.pictureDescription: A simple picture showing a mother, father, two children and a friend in a garden.
followUpQuestions: Who is he in the picture?
How old is your brother or sister?
Say one sentence about your family.

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Từ gia đình (mother, father, brother, sister, friend) nghe được rõ.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Trả lời bằng từ hoặc cụm ngắn; không im lặng quá lâu.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Dùng am/is/are hoặc my/his/her trong ít nhất hai câu trả lời.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Dùng ít nhất ba từ vựng unit đúng nghĩa.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Quick Situational Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase for each situation.

questions.questionText: Someone says: Nice to meet your family! You say:
questions.explanation: We are happy! — phản hồi tích cực phù hợp unit.

questions.questionText: Examiner points to your sister. You say:
questions.explanation: She is my sister.

exercises.title: Review: Situational Speaking Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply.

questions.questionText: What is your best friend's name? You say:
questions.explanation: Her name is Anna. / His name is Tom. — tùy giới tính.

questions.questionText: Say one sentence about your mother. You say:
questions.explanation: My mother is kind. — như bài đọc Mai.

questions.questionText: Your brother is six. You say:
questions.explanation: He is six. / My brother is six.
